title: 13 AFT Deadlines, Record Entry Limits, and PaymentStream AFT Data Purge Schedule
body_text:
13	AFT Deadlines, Record Entry Limits, and PaymentStream AFT Data Purge Schedule
13.1	AFT File Delivery Deadlines and Record Entry Limits
AFT transactions/files must be sent to Central 1 before the applicable deadline. The due date of an AFT transaction can be backdated or future dated. For more information on AFT file delivery deadlines and for record entry limits, see the Introduction to AFT Part.
13.2	Purge Schedule for PaymentStream AFT Transactions
After a certain time, report data is deleted from
PaymentStreamâ¢
AFT. The information is deleted on Sundays between 1:00 am and 3:00 am PT.
